videos.headline: Charlotte instantly goes up 14-0 on pick-six
videos.description: Taulia Tagovailoa throws an interception that Charlotte takes back to increase its lead on Maryland.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Charlotte instantly goes up 14-0 on pick-six) 2023/09/09 ESHEET
